ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  " IPO_date" TEXT /* Date of Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total turnover of shares (in currency) */,
  "pre_close" REAL /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Amount of change in price from the previous close */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous close */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "index_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index component */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market index */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Current notification status (e.g., triggered, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria defining the strategy's conditions */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the index is listed */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_data" (
  "index_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening value of the index */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest value of the index during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest value of the index during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing value of the index */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who made the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were bought or sold */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Transaction fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock related to the article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
